{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230113137A933769071CE04107C5"}"},"total":87},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529510471574553369","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者笔力可以的，完全不像新人，特别是能把传统玄幻和西幻游戏闯关元素完美糅合在一起，游戏作为主角的金手指，外挂恰到好处，主要是不无脑必须点个赞"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753103171,"group_id":"7340556698735627326","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我真的是新人啊！啊啊！啊啊啊！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0v1jbpz3vjkUOln9NraLRZTbv8CMWGlyMbOTbOCAR7n","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2903123434420328","user_name":"乌洛波洛斯"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2903123434420328","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7340556698735627326","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越异界，仙武并起。
夏都带着勇者大陆游戏系统穿越神宇界，成为镇北公府十七公子。
开局入狱，爹爹不疼，爷爷不爱。
本以为人生会一片灰暗，但没想到曾经将他虐的欲仙欲死的游戏成了他的救世主。
幽灵废墟的金太郎为他带来了金刚不坏的魔转轮，
幽灵船的死灵巫师为他带来了破碎山河的红魔爆，
火鸟巢穴的火鸟王为他带来了不死不灭的火焰之心。
在这些游戏Boss慷慨无私的奉献下，夏都成功走到了最顶端。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o669a1a3de04061d521d0874ab9e48641~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"御前都尉","author_id":"","book_id":"7340556698735627326","book_name":"地牢开服：勇者系统战诸天","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#304058","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7340559073215005209","read_count":"365","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"367031"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"134","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/117ec74e51cd50b4db2f7fc6c3c775af~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383594&x-signature=xFegyxmYT9cgwikslJwjNUJz2L0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"131542035989511","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"118"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230113137A933769071CE04107C5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":28098,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":932},"user_action":{"author":
